description: Domain port (inbound) that defines the search contract — ES adapter fulfills it, keeping domain free of infrastructure.
Domain port for indexing — infrastructure adapter wires to Elasticsearch BulkIngester.
Adapter that bridges the domain ProductSearchPort to Spring Data Elasticsearch infrastructure.
Application service only depends on domain ports (not implementations) — textbook hexagonal architecture.
Use case interface in the application layer with nested Query/Result data classes — enforces clean inward dependency.
Creates an Elasticsearch index with nori tokenizer — sets up the inverted index structure with Korean morphological analysis.
Atomically removes old alias targets and adds new index — zero-downtime alias swap pattern for lossless reindexing.
Dual BulkIngester (primary + retry) with configurable batch sizes and flush intervals for high-throughput ES indexing.
Kafka consumer that reactively indexes products into ES on domain events — event-driven CQRS read model update.
Independent consumer microservice subscribes to product service Kafka events — cross-service communication without direct dependency.
Exponential backoff error handler for Kafka consumer failures — prevents thundering-herd on transient errors.

codeSnippet:
data class ProductDocument(
    val id: String,
    val name: String,
    val price: BigDecimal,
    val status: String,
    val createdAt: LocalDateTime = LocalDateTime.now(),
    val popularityScore: Double = 0.0,
    val ctr: Double = 0.0,
    val cvr: Double = 0.0,
    val scoreUpdatedAt: Long = 0
)
description: Pure Kotlin data class as domain model — immutable value representation, auto-generated equals/hashCode/copy.
Spring Data ES annotations map Kotlin properties to Elasticsearch field types and analyzers declaratively.

codeSnippet:
companion object {
    fun fromDomain(doc: ProductDocument) = ProductEsDocument(
        id = doc.id,
        name = doc.name,
        price = doc.price,
        status = doc.status,
        createdAt = doc.createdAt,
        popularityScore = doc.popularityScore,
        ctr = doc.ctr,
        cvr = doc.cvr,
    )
}
description: Companion object factory method for domain-to-ES document conversion — idiomatic Kotlin static-like constructor.
REST endpoint exposing keyword-based product search with pagination — standard HTTP GET with query params.

codeSnippet:
suspend fun fetchPage(page: Int, size: Int = 100): ProductPageResponse {
    val response = webClient.get()
        .uri("/api/products?page=$page&size=$size")
        .retrieve()
        .bodyToMono(object : ParameterizedTypeReference<Map<String, Any>>() {})
        .awaitSingle()
}
description: WebClient with Kotlin coroutines awaitSingle — bridges reactive Mono to suspend function for batch reindexing.

codeSnippet:
package com.kgd.search.domain.product.model

data class ProductDocument(
    val id: String,
    val name: String,
    val price: BigDecimal,
    val status: String,
    val popularityScore: Double = 0.0,
    val ctr: Double = 0.0,
    val cvr: Double = 0.0
)
description: Domain model in dedicated domain module — search bounded context owns its own ProductDocument read model, separate from the product service's entity.
ApiResponse<T> generic wrapper ensures type-safe response envelope across all REST endpoints.
